channel.title: KL The Guide - Blog
channel.description: All Latest Blog of KL The Guide

item.title: EXPERIENCE A STEM ADVENTURE AT PETROSAINS: WHERE SCIENCE MEETS FUN
item.description: Head over to the captivating world of Petrosains, The Discovery Centre, located within the iconic Petronas Twin Towers in Kuala Lumpur.

item.title: SHOP TIL YOU DROP AT FREEPORT A'FAMOSA OUTLET
item.description: Level up your shopping experience at Freeport A'Famosa Outlet, an open-air retail haven featuring a wide range of renowned outlet stores and a diverse food court.

item.title: DISCOVER TRANQUILITY AND ADORABLE ANIMALS AT THE BENTONG FARM
item.description: Escape the urban hustle and immerse yourself in the tranquility of nature at The Bentong Farm, a unique destination that brings the charm of rural life to city dwellers.

item.title: INDULGE IN SWEET BLISS AT EL IBERICO
item.description: For those with a passion for exceptional culinary experiences in Kuala Lumpur, El Iberico stands out as a true gem, offering an authentic taste of Lebanon amid the city's hustle and bustle.

item.title: UNLOCK RADIANT WELLNESS WITH ZELL-V'S PRODUCTS AND TREATMENTS
item.description: Try out a rejuvenating journey with Zell-V's top-notch products and treatments designed for your well-being.

item.title: VISIT DATARAN PAHLAWAN MEGAMALL IN THE HEART OF THE HISTORICAL CITY, MELAKA
item.description: If you're planning a visit to the historical city of Melaka, there's one place you simply can't miss: Dataran Pahlawan Melaka Megamall.

item.title: HAVE A MEMORABLE STAYCATION AT MOTY HOTEL IN MELAKA
item.description: Have you been planning to travel to Melaka and experience the enchanting historical city?

item.title: EXPERIENCE THE SWEET BUZZ : GIANT B BEE FARM IN MELAKA
item.description: Experience the delightful world of Giant B Bee Farm Tour in Melaka, where you not only get to savor the freshness of honeycomb harvested on the spot but also unlock the natural, green, and healthy benefits of honey products.

item.title: GET READY FOR OUTDOOR EXCITEMENT WITH PROJEK OUTDOOR'S ADRENALINE-PACKED PACKAGES
item.description: If you're someone who loves outdoor activities and craves excitement on the weekends, check out Projek Outdoor's offerings.

item.title: REGAIN YOUR BODY CONFIDENCE WITH GLOJAS CLINIC
item.description: Are you battling insecurities about your body?

item.title: REVITALIZE YOUR WELL-BEING AT HUA THO FOOT REFLEXOLOGY CENTRE
item.description: Did you know that the art of foot reflexology can be a game-changer for your health and overall well-being?

item.title: EXPLORE THE BUZZ AT WINNIE'S HONEY IN MELAKA
item.description: When you are in Melaka, make your way to Winnie's Bee Farm to unveil the secrets of bee life and the fascinating honey-making process.

item.title: PETRONAS TWIN TOWERS: MALAYSIA'S PRIDE AND ICONIC LANDMARK
item.description: Petronas Twin Towers - Malaysia's renowned symbol, seen in various artworks and souvenirs.

item.title: UNLOCK DIGESTIVE WELLNESS: DON'T MISS OUT ON CENGILD G. I. MEDICAL CENTRE'S EXCLUSIVE PACKAGE FROM THE RECENT BANGSAR SOUTH ROADSHOW!
item.description: Missed the recent roadshow at Bangsar South?

item.title: ELEVATE YOUR HOLIDAY EXPERIENCE WITH WYNDHAM GRAND BANGSAR
item.description: Immerse in the festive spirit and make this holiday season truly memorable with a staycation at Wyndham Grand Bangsar in Kuala Lumpur.

item.title: WELLNESS AND LUXURY STAY AT THE ORCHARD WELLNESS & HEALTH RESORT IN MELAKA
item.description: When you are planning a trip to Melaka, consider a stay at The Orchard Wellness & Health Resort.

item.title: EXPERIENCE THE FAMOUS TURKISH ICE CREAM PRANK IN KUALA LUMPUR ONLY AT AL AMAR EXPRESS
item.description: Visit Al Amar Express at Fahrenheit Bukit Bintang for a delightful taste of Turkish Ice Cream and a playful ice cream prank experience.

item.title: HOTEL ROYAL SIGNATURE'S CHRISTMAS BUFFET EXTRAVAGANZA
item.description: Are you ready for a delightful Christmas celebration?

item.title: DISCOVER THE PERFECT HANGOUT: ARTHUR'S STOREHOUSE IN PAVILION BUKIT JALIL
item.description: Are you searching for the ideal spot to chill, have some drinks, and catch up with friends in Bukit Jalil?

item.title: UNWRAP THE FESTIVE FLAVORS WITH WYNDHAM ACMAR KLANG'S CHRISTMAS CELEBRATION
item.description: Feel the enchantment and joy this festive season as Wyndham Acmar Klang brings you a Christmas celebration like no other.

item.title: SPECIAL PERKS AWAIT WITH ALL MEETING PLANNER AT MERCURE KUALA LUMPUR GLENMARIE
item.description: Elevate your event experience at Mercure Kuala Lumpur Glenmarie and double the joy with their ALL Meeting Planner!

item.title: CELEBRATE CHRISTMAS THAI-STYLE AT CHAKRI PALACE
item.description: Get ready to savor the flavors of Thailand this Christmas season at Chakri Palace Royal Thai Cuisine with their delightful Thai Xmas set.

item.title: DISCOVER THE HIDDEN GEM OF TELUK GONG KLANG: COCONUT FLOWER SEAFOOD RESTAURANT
item.description: Nestled away in Teluk Gong Klang, Coconut Flower Seafood Restaurant is a culinary treasure trove.

item.title: BUKIT TINGGI MEDICAL CENTRE: HOLISTIC APPROACH TO WELLNESS IN KLANG
item.description: Bukit Tinggi Medical Centre (BTMC) is your go-to spot for top-notch healthcare in the Ramsay Sime Darby group, living up to their slogan "People Caring for People."

item.title: SAVOR SCRUMPTIOUS SEAFOOD BY THE SEA AT THE VIEW SEAFOOD TERRACE
item.description: Enjoy tasty seafood dishes while gazing out over the ocean at The View Seafood Terrace.

item.title: SRI KOTA SPECIALIST MEDICAL CENTRE - YOUR ULTIMATE HEALTH HUB IN KLANG
item.description: Sri Kota Specialist Medical Centre is your one-stop medical centre in Klang.

item.title: DISCOVER KLANG VALLEY'S CHARM WITH KLANG VALLEY 4 LOCALS
item.description: Your search to explore beyond Kuala Lumpur ends now, as Klang Valley 4 Locals is making a comeback!

item.title: STAY IN TRANQUILITY AND LUXURY IN KLANG: KSL ESPLANADE HOTEL
item.description: If you're planning an exciting day of visiting the Royal City in Klang and want a chill staycation, you have to check out the KSL Esplanade Hotel.

item.title: GET READY TO GET PAINT-BLASTED AT BOMB BATTLE
item.description: It's the ultimate destination for a mind-blowing, paint-splattering experience you won't forget!

item.title: YOUR IDEAL 5-STAR MALAYSIAN RETREAT AT WYNDHAM GRAND BANGSAR
item.description: Located right in the heart of the vibrant Kuala Lumpur, this 5-star hotel called Wyndham Grand Bangsar Kuala Lumpur proudly claims its title as Malaysia's first Wyndham Grand property.

item.title: AUTHENTIC THAI CUISINE AT CHAKRI XPRESS IN KL CONVENTION CENTER FOOD COURT
item.description: Located within the bustling Kuala Lumpur Convention Centre, Chakri Xpress is a delightful gem for Thai food lovers.

item.title: ENJOY FLAVOURFUL KOREAN BBQ IN KUALA LUMPUR AT GUI GUI BBQ
item.description: Craving for some mouthwatering Korean BBQ in the heart of Kuala Lumpur?

item.title: FRESH SEAFOOD IN THE HEART OF KUALA LUMPUR AT MARINA SEAFOOD
item.description: For those seafood enthusiasts seeking a premium dining experience in the heart of Kuala Lumpur, Marina Seafood should be your next stop.

item.title: HAVE A RELAXING GETAWAY AT DE KING BOUTIQUE HOTEL KLCC
item.description: Just a short walk from the famous Petronas Twin Towers, you'll find the conveniently located De King Hotel.

item.title: EXPLORE SABAH'S SPLENDOR: YOUR ULTIMATE GUIDE IN YOUR POCKET!
item.description: Good news for travel enthusiasts!

item.title: STAY IN LUXURY AND TRANQUILITY AT ONE WORLD HOTEL, PETALING JAYA
item.description: If you're in Kuala Lumpur and seeking a 5-star escape from the city's bustling traffic, have a staycation at One World Hotel in Petaling Jaya.

item.title: ULTIMATE STAY EXPERIENCE AT HOTEL ROYAL SIGNATURE IN KUALA LUMPUR
item.description: When it comes to finding the perfect place to stay in Kuala Lumpur, Hotel Royal Signature tops the list of recommendations.

item.title: HOW TO GET TO EL IBERICO VIA PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION
item.description: El Iberico is a culinary gem that transports you to the rich flavors of Spain and the Mediterranean.

item.title: UNLOCK A HEALTHIER YOU WITH AFFORDABLE HEALTH SCREENING AT CENGILD G.I. MEDICAL CENTRE
item.description: Take a proactive step towards a healthier you with our comprehensive health screening packages, starting from just RM188!

item.title: WIN EXCITING VOUCHERS FROM KL THE GUIDE, PARTNERING WITH ASTRO'S RADIO CRUISER
item.description: Grab this exciting opportunity to win some fantastic vouchers for FREE!

item.title: SAVOR THE FLAVOURS OF MALAYSIA AT MADAM KWAN'S WITH EXCLUSIVE DISCOUNTS
item.description: Exciting promotions when you dine in Malaysian cuisines at Madam Kwan by KL The Guide

item.title: Medical Tourism: UNLOCK YOUR BEST SELF AT ALPS MEDICAL CENTRE
item.description: Are you looking to boost your beauty and well-being?

item.title: MOUTHWATERING BBQ DELIGHTS AT WYNDHAM ACMAR KLANG
item.description: Check out this all-you-can-eat buffet at Wyndham Acmar Klang, particularly a Barbeque Dinner Buffet!

item.title: KL THE GUIDE'S FREE INTERACTIVE EBOOKS: YOUR ULTIMATE TRAVEL COMPANION
item.description: In this digital era, KL The Guide provides convenience to make your Kuala Lumpur travel experience easier.

item.title: DISCOVERING THE TASTE OF LEBANON: AL AMAR'S JOURNEY SINCE 2008
item.description: In 2008, a culinary gem was established in the bustling heart of Kuala Lumpur.

item.title: GET EXCLUSIVE ACCESS TO FREE TRAVEL GUIDES AT MALAYSIA AIRLINES GOLDEN LOUNGE!
item.description: Attention to our fellow travelers!

item.title: HOW TO GET TO ARTHUR'S STOREHOUSE USING PUBLIC TRANSPORT
item.description: Experience the charm of Guinness at Arthur's Storehouse, right in the heart of KL!

item.title: ENHANCE YOUR BUSINESS TRAVEL EXPERIENCE AT MERCURE KUALA LUMPUR GLENMARIE
item.description: Elevate your business travels with Mercure Kuala Lumpur Glenmarie.

item.title: STAY HEALTHY AND HAZE-READY WITH ZELL-V WELLNESS
item.description: As the haze returns, it brings with it a host of health concerns due to toxic gases and hazardous PM 2.5 particles.

item.title: UNLOCK YOUR BEST SMILE AT GLOJAS DENTAL CLINIC
item.description: At Glojas Dental Clinic, you can access a wide range of dental services, ensuring your dental health is in good hands.

item.title: EXPLORING KUALA LUMPUR'S ENCHANTED EVENT LANDSCAPE WITH #TEAMDOREMI
item.description: Welcome to a captivating journey through Kuala Lumpur's event scene, guided by a curious business traveler.

item.title: EXPLORE KUALA LUMPUR LIKE A PRO WITH KL THE GUIDE MOBILE APP
item.description: In the era of smartphones and digital technology, traveling has never been more convenient and exciting.

item.title: PLAZA LOW YAT: YOUR ULTIMATE TECH DESTINATION IN KUALA LUMPUR
item.description: Plaza Low Yat, the largest certified IT lifestyle mall in Malaysia, is a tech enthusiast's haven nestled in the heart of Kuala Lumpur.

item.title: DISCOVER HEALING AND WELLNESS AT AYUR CENTRE: MALAYSIA'S PREMIER AYURVEDIC DESTINATION
item.description: In a world where the pace of modern life can take a toll on our health and well-being, it's essential to explore holistic approaches to healing and rejuvenation.

item.title: BUDGET TRAVELERS' GEM IN KUALA LUMPUR: LYF RAJA CHULAN
item.description: Are you planning a trip to Kuala Lumpur and want a comfy place to stay without breaking the bank?

item.title: A PARADISE FOR ANIMAL LOVERS: 99 WONDERLAND PARK
item.description: If you're an animal lover seeking a magical place to connect with nature and have a fantastic family outing, 99 Wonderland Park is the ultimate destination.

item.title: CHECK OUT THE FRIENDLIEST DENTAL CLINIC IN KUALA LUMPUR - DENTAL PRO
item.description: Dental Pro is a dental clinic located in the western side of Kuala Lumpur which is in Damansara Heights.

item.title: ROCKAFELLERS KITCHEN + BAR: WHERE GOOD FOOD AND GREAT VIBES COLLIDE!
item.description: If you're thinking about exploring beyond Kuala Lumpur and heading to Genting Highlands, be sure to check out Rockafellers Kitchen + Bar.

item.title: HOW TO GET TO FARM IN THE CITY KL AND BENTONG
item.description: Farm In The City offers a remarkable experience that bridges the gap between urban living and rural charm.

item.title: EXPLORE YOUR ARTISTIC SIDE AT JADI BATEK
item.description: Looking for a creative adventure in Kuala Lumpur?

item.title: RELAX AND REJUVENATE AT URBAN RETREAT SPA
item.description: After a hectic week at work, there's nothing like a spa day to melt your stress away.

item.title: ELEVATE YOUR DINING EXPERIENCE AT CHAKRI RAINTREE SKYBAR
item.description: If you're in search of a dining experience that goes beyond exceptional food, look no further than Chakri Raintree Skybar, nestled atop the Dorsett Hartamas Hotel.

item.title: DISCOVER DELECTABLE SPANISH AND MEDITERRANEAN DELIGHTS AT EL IBERICO
item.description: El Iberico is a welcoming restaurant nestled in the heart of Kuala Lumpur.

item.title: EXCITING GIVEAWAY VOUCHERS BY KL THE GUIDE, PARTNERING WITH ASTRO'S RADIO CRUISER EVENT
item.description: Are you ready for an exciting opportunity to win some fantastic vouchers?

item.description: Health screening for your gut at Cengild G.I. Medical Centre by KL The Guide

item.title: HAVE A WEEKEND LUXURY STAYCATION AT GREYSTONE PLATINUM SUITES
item.description: Looking for the perfect staycation spot in Kuala Lumpur during the weekend to unwind?

item.title: KL THE GUIDE: YOUR ULTIMATE COMPANION TO EXPLORE KUALA LUMPUR
item.description: When it comes to exploring the vibrant city of Kuala Lumpur, KL The Guide printed copies are your best bet.

item.title: MADAM KWAN'S NEW OUTLET AT PAVILION DAMANSARA HEIGHTS
item.description: Pavilion Damansara Heights recently celebrated its grand opening, and as part of this exciting event, Madam Kwan's has introduced a new branch at the mall!

item.title: PINK ELEGANCE AFTERNOON TEA AT WYNDHAM ACMAR KLANG
item.description: In conjunction with Pink October, a month dedicated to raising awareness about breast cancer, Wyndham Acmar Klang offers a pink-themed tea party for two!

item.title: HOW TO GET TO AL-AMAR LEBANESE CUISINE USING PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION
item.description: AL-AMAR is the perfect one-stop destination if you would like to savor the essence of the Middle East specifically Lebanon.

item.title: ARTHUR'S STOREHOUSE AT PAVILION BUKIT JALIL IS NOW OPEN!
item.description: Exciting news for all the Malaysian Guinness lovers!

item.title: EXPLORING MALAYSIA'S PREMIER EXHIBITION HALLS WITH #TEAMDOREMI
item.description: Check out Malaysia's top exhibition venues, showcasing how innovation, culture, and practicality combine to create memorable experiences.

item.title: LUXURY STAY ON A BUDGET AT MERCURE KUALA LUMPUR GLENMARIE
item.description: Mercure Kuala Lumpur has got you covered with fantastic discounts that will let you enjoy luxury without the hefty price tag.

item.title: ZELL-V WELLNESS HUB IN JOHOR BAHRU!
item.description: Exciting news for those in Johor Bahru!

item.description: Have you been wanting to get flawless skin?

item.title: A PATH TO A BETTER HEALTH AND WELLBEING WITH KLINIK Q
item.description: Check out one of the best places to improve your health and well-being in KL which is at Klinik Q, with locations in Kota Damansara, Bangsar, and Balakong.

item.title: RELAX AND HAVE A THERAPEUTIC MASSAGE AT MANJAKAKI
item.description: In the hustle and bustle of our daily lives, it's essential to take a moment to unwind and pamper ourselves.

item.title: REDISCOVER YOUR BEAUTY AT M∙A∙C∙ CLINIC
item.description: Look no further than M∙A∙C∙ Clinic, a pioneering establishment in Kuala Lumpur offering a range of non-invasive and minimally invasive aesthetic procedures.

item.title: SAVOR THE ESSENCE OF SPAIN IN KUALA LUMPUR AT EL IBERICO
item.description: El Iberico is a delightful culinary haven that brings the authentic flavors of Spain to the heart of Kuala Lumpur city.

item.title: AUTHENTIC THAI CUISINE AT IMPERIAL CHAKRI PALACE IN KLCC
item.description: If you are in Kuala Lumpur and you find yourself craving a taste of Thailand, make your way to Imperial Chakri Palace.

item.title: STAYCATION AT GREYSTONE D'MAJESTIC PLACE WITH THE ICONIC INFINITY POOL OVERLOOKING KL CITY
item.description: Greystone D'Majestic Place is one of the best places to stay if you are in Kuala Lumpur.

item.description: Calling all food enthusiasts with a love for sweet treats!

item.description: Did you know that obesity leads to an elevated risk of developing gastrointestinal disease?

item.title: EXPERIENCE A CULINARY JOURNEY TO THE MIDDLE EAST AT AL AMAR
item.description: As you step into Al Amar, you'll be greeted by a feast for your senses.

item.title: EXPERIENCE PENFOLDS & CIGAR EVENING AT ARTHUR'S STOREHOUSE
item.description: Imagine an evening where sophistication, flavor, and style converge, creating an atmosphere of pure indulgence.

item.title: EXPLORING THE FUTURE OF WELLNESS, CULTURE AND TOURISM: GWCTC2023
item.description: Over 1,000 experts from the wellness, culture, travel, and tourism industries from around the world will gather at Royale Chulan Kuala Lumpur from Oct 26 to Oct 28 for the Global Wellness, Cultural, and Tourism Convention 2023 (GWCTC2023).

item.title: ELEVATE YOUR GATHERINGS WITH UNIQUE EVENT SPACES AT MERCURE KUALA LUMPUR GLENMARIE
item.description: Are you in search of an amazing venue to host your next private gathering near Kuala Lumpur?

item.title: EXPLORING KUALA LUMPUR'S TOP BUSINESS MEETING VENUES WITH #TEAMDOREMI: A GUIDE FOR TRAVEL ENTHUSIASTS
item.description: Malaysia has a wide range of meeting places that can be used for both work and travel, specifically in Kuala Lumpur.

item.title: DISCOVER RENEWED VITALITY AT ZELL-V WELLNESS HUB IN KUALA LUMPUR
item.description: In the bustling heart of Kuala Lumpur lies a special place dedicated to helping people achieve lifelong health and vitality - Zell-V Wellness Hub!

item.title: REDISCOVER CONFIDENCE WITH SMART FUE HAIR RESTORATION AT GLOJAS HEALTH CLINIC
item.description: Are you tired of worrying about your receding hairline, thinning mid-scalp, or that balding crown area?

item.title: HAVE A NATURE GETAWAY AMIDST THE CITY AND MEET CUTE ANIMALS AT FARM IN THE CITY
item.description: Petting zoo with farm animals at Farm In The City by KL The Guide

item.title: DISCOVER LUXURY AND WELLNESS AT MALAYSIA'S FIRST MARINE-BASED SKINCARE SPA - THALGO SPA
item.description: As Malaysia's first marine-based skincare luxury hotel spa, Thalgo Spa offers a haven of rejuvenation that will leave you feeling good after pampering yourself at this spa.

item.title: INDULGE AT MADAM KWAN'S, A NATIONWIDE DELIGHT
item.description: Kuala Lumpur, the bustling capital of Malaysia, is a paradise for food lovers.

item.title: SAVOUR AUTHENTIC AFGHAN CUISINE AT KABUL DARBAR RESTAURANT
item.description: Try out tasty and authentic Middle Eastern cuisine at Kabul Darbar Restaurant, particularly Afghan cuisine.

item.description: Are you looking for a shopping experience like no other?

item.description: Are you looking for an opulent and contemporary hotel nestled in the heart of Kuala Lumpur?

item.title: INDULGE IN CULINARY EXCELLENCE AT WYNDHAM ACMAR KLANG HOTEL
item.description: As the first 5-star hotel in the area, this elegant establishment has set the bar high, offering a gastronomic journey that combines delicious dishes, impeccable service, and a touch of luxury.

item.description: Are you a food enthusiast on the hunt for an exquisite culinary experience in Kuala Lumpur?

item.description: From the moment you step through the door, you're stepping into a world of tradition, craft, and the iconic black stout that has won hearts across the globe.

item.title: HAVE A LUXURY STAY AT MERCURE KUALA LUMPUR HOTEL GLENMARIE WITHOUT HURTING YOUR POCKET
item.description: Say no more, because Mercure Kuala Lumpur has an irresistible offer that will have you experiencing the epitome of opulence at a fraction of the cost.

item.title: ENHANCE YOUR BEAUTY AND FEEL AMAZING AT GLOJAS HEALTH CLINIC BY SMART INTERNATIONAL AESTHETIC
item.description: In the bustling city of KL, there is a prestigious clinic that has been transforming lives for over 26 years - GLOJAS HEALTH CLINIC.

item.description: Are you ready to embrace the thrill of speed and experience an adrenaline-pumping adventure like never before?

item.description: ZELL-V WELLNESS HUB, a trailblazing wellness center in Malaysia, offers the revolutionary EECP ANGIO treatment, a groundbreaking approach to heart health.

item.description: Rediscover your inner and outer radiance at Glojas Smart International Aesthetic!

item.description: Have you been wanting to escape the bustling city after a long week?

item.title: VILLA NADIAH - BEST STAYCATION SPOT AMIDST NATURE IN JANDA BAIK
item.description: VILLA NADIAH is one of the best staycation spots nearby Kuala Lumpur as it is just a 40-minute drive from Kuala Lumpur's city center.

item.title: ENJOY DELECTABLE MALAYSIAN CUISINES AT MADAM KWAN'S
item.description: Madam Kwan is one of the best places to eat when you are craving some delicious Malaysian delights.

item.title: STAYCATION AT ONE OF THE BEST 5-STAR HOTELS NEARBY KL @ WYNDHAM ACMAR
item.description: The Wyndham Acmar Klang is a modern, 26-story hotel with 488 well-appointed and spacious guestrooms in Bandar Baru Klang.

item.title: A WEEKEND GETAWAY AT ONE OF THE HIDDEN GEMS OF KUALA LUMPUR @ LERENG TANAH
item.description: Lereng Tanah is the perfect place to go if you are planning to escape the hustle and bustle of Kuala Lumpur city.

item.title: HOW TO GET TO ZELL-V WELLNESS HUB USING PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION
item.description: ZELL-V WELLNESS is a Wellness Hub that provides you one-stop healthcare solutions.

item.description: Did you know that Middle Eastern cuisine offers the best culinary experience of any cuisine?

item.title: SATISFY BOTH YOUR HUNGER AND ALCOHOLIC NEEDS WITH GUINNESS-INFUSED DISHES AT ARTHUR'S STOREHOUSE
item.description: Have you been wanting to have a culinary experience unlike any other in the heart of KL?

item.title: 6 INTERESTING THINGS TO EXPERIENCE IN LALAPORT BUKIT BINTANG
item.description: The new shopping mall is called Mitsui Shopping Park Lalaport, which is a Japanese mall.

item.title: MERCURE KL IS THE BEST PLACE FOR A STAYCATION DURING THE UPCOMING SCHOOL HOLIDAYS
item.description: The school holidays are just around the corner and Mercure KL is having a promotion for you!

item.title: TRAVEL WITH PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION IN KL, IS IT CONVENIENT?
item.description: By using public transport, you get to relax and just wait until you reach your desired destination.

item.title: SAVOUR THE TANTALIZING DISH OF STEAK AND LOBSTER ONLY AT KAY'S STEAK & LOBSTER
item.description: Head over to Kay's Steak & Lobster for an extraordinary menu that will tantalize your taste buds!

item.title: BE PURELY IN THE MOMENT WITH THE LIVE MUSIC AT ARTHUR'S STOREHOUSE
item.description: Experience live band at Arthur's Storehouse by KL The Guide

item.title: ENJOY FRAGRANT CLAYPOT NASI BRIYANI AT LEGEND'S CLAYPOT BRIYANI
item.description: Have a hearty meal of delicious and fragrant claypot biryani at LEGEND'S CLAYPOT BRIYANI!

item.title: UNWIND AND REJUVENATE AT THE OM SPA AT ZELL-V WELLNESS
item.description: Have you been wanting to relax and escape from your busy schedule?

item.title: HAVE AN ENJOYABLE DINING EXPERIENCE WITH AMAZING PERFORMANCES AT AL-AMAR
item.description: Are you planning on having a chill night while hanging out with your friends and family in the heart of KL?

item.title: 5 DATING LOCATIONS IN KL THAT YOU CAN BRING YOUR PARTNER
item.description: We are here to help!

item.title: TRY OUT GUINNESS-INFUSED FOOD AND COCKTAIL MENU ONLY AT ARTHUR'S STOREHOUSE
item.description: Guinness-infused food at Arthur's Storehouse by KL The Guide

item.title: ENJOY A LUXURIOUS AND COMFORTABLE STAY AT MERCURE KL
item.description: MERCURE KUALA LUMPUR GLENMARIE is a four-star hotel that is located in Shah Alam, just a short 30-minute drive from Kuala Lumpur.

item.title: ENJOY A DELICIOUS NYONYA-INSPIRED STEAMBOAT MEAL AT RASANYA STEAMBOAT
item.description: Did you know that the Peranakans are well-known for their food?

item.title: RELAX AND REJUVENATE AT ZELL-V WELLNESS
item.description: ZELL-V WELLNESS is a Wellness Hub that provides you one-stop healthcare solutions.

item.title: EXPERIENCE THE TASTE OF JAPANESE & CHINESE CUISINE AT NAKAMURA BASHI RESTAURANT
item.description: Visit the NAKAMURA BASHI RESTAURANT to sample Japanese Chinese food!

item.title: EXPERIENCE A CULINARY JOURNEY TO THE LAND OF LEBANON AT AL-AMAR!
item.description: Try out tasty and authentic Middle Eastern cuisine at Al-Amar, particularly Lebanese cuisine.

item.title: EXPERIENCE A MARRAKESH-THEMED VIVID RAYA CELEBRATION AT AVENUE K SHOPPING MALL!
item.description: Vivid Raya at Avenue K Shopping Mall by KL The Guide

item.title: GET UP CLOSE AND PERSONAL WITH CUTE ANIMALS AT FARM IN THE CITY
item.description: FARM IN THE CITY combines elements of nature and wildlife in a carefully designed setting resembling a conservation park.

item.title: HAVE THE TIME OF YOUR LIFE AT BERJAYA TIMES SQUARE THEME PARK
item.description: The Berjaya Times Square Theme Park, which is located on the fifth and seventh floors of the Berjaya Times Square Mall, is the largest indoor theme park in Malaysia.

item.title: ENHANCE YOUR SKIN APPEARANCE AND BEAUTY AT DERMLAZE
item.description: DERMLAZE, a reputable skin clinic and aesthetic center in Petaling Jaya, strives to offer top-notch, up-to-date beauty services at a reasonable cost.

item.title: BEAUTIFY YOUR PHYSIQUE AT DR JANE CLINIC
item.description: Explore options for all of your skin's demands as you deserve the greatest treatment that money can buy when it comes to your beauty!

item.title: PAMPER YOURSELF AT CASABLANCA AESTHETIC TODAY!
item.description: Injectable treatments, facials, slimming regimens, hair removal, and detox baths are just a few of the beauty and aesthetic services offered here, perfect for ladies to unwind and relax.

item.title: VISIT GUINNESS MALAYSIA'S FIRST OUTLET - ARTHUR'S STOREHOUSE!
item.description: Guinness Malaysia First Flagship Outlet at Arthur's Storehouse by KL The Guide

item.title: MAKE ADVANCE RESERVATIONS ON YOUR RAMADAN BUFFET AT AL AMAR FOR A DISCOUNT!
item.description: In the center of Kuala Lumpur's Golden Triangle, at Al-Amar, you can savor delicious and authentic Middle Eastern food, notably Lebanese cuisine.

item.title: INDULGE ON DELICIOUS AMERICAN MIDWEST DISHES AT BETTY'S MIDWEST KITCHEN IN PETALING JAYA
item.description: For those of you who are searching for a culinary experience like no other, look no further than Betty's Midwest Kitchen!

item.title: ENJOY SOME COLD SENSATION OF CENDOL AT CENDOL KAMPUNG HULU
item.description: In need of some cold sensation during a scorching hot day?

item.title: HAVE A WEEKEND GETAWAY SURROUNDED BY TRANQUIL NATURE AT RUST CAMPS
item.description: Who said weekends are just for sleeping in?

item.title: ENJOY THE BEST SATAY IN JOHOR- SATAY TELUK ISKANDAR!
item.description: Check out this restaurant that serves delicious satay in Mersing, Johor!

item.title: 5 BUDGET-FRIENDLY FINE DINING RESTAURANTS THROUGHOUT KUALA LUMPUR
item.description: Valentine's Day is just around the corner!

item.title: ENJOY VARIOUS AUTHENTIC NYONYA KUIH AT NYONYA HERITAGE STALL IN KL
item.description: Stop by this stall in Brickfields for a wide variety of authentic traditional Nyonya Kuih to choose from!

item.title: HAVE YOU HEARD OF THE NEW FAST FOOD FROM THE PHILIPPINES, JOLLIBEE?
item.description: Jollibee has finally opened its first outlet in West Malaysia and it is at Sunway Pyramid!

item.title: 6 INTERESTING THINGS TO EXPERIENCE AT AVENUE K SHOPPING MALL
item.description: This mall is located just nearby KLCC!

item.title: VISIT THIS UNIQUE MALL WITH A TREE HOUSE IN SANCTUARY MALL@ECO SANCTUARY
item.description: In Eco Sanctuary City, Eco Sanctuary, there is a shopping center called Sanctuary Mall.

item.title: CHECK OUT THE BEST SEAFOOD RESTAURANT THAT SERVES THE FRESHEST CRABS IN KL & PJ - THE LANKAN CRABS
item.description: THE LANKAN CRABS serves authentic Sri Lankan Crabs recipes in the heart of Bangsar.

item.title: VISIT THE CROCODILES AND OTHER ANIMALS AT TAMAN BUAYA & REKREASI MELAKA
item.description: The crocodile park is situated in Ayer Keroh and it is the best place to visit when you are in Melaka.

item.title: BEGIN AN ENDLESS JOURNEY OF DISCOVERY IN THE HEART OF KUALA LUMPUR'S DIAMOND TRANGLE - SUNWAY PUTRA HOTEL
item.description: Just opposite the World Trade Centre Kuala Lumpur (formerly known as Putra World Trade Centre or PWTC), the 5-star Sunway Putra Hotel is a destination of fascinating contrasts, combining the charms of a private enclave with the energy of a dynamic city for a memorable discovery.

item.title: A QUIRKY URBAN ART EXPERIENCE AT URBAN MUSEUM (UR-MU)
item.description: Ur-Mu is a passion project by an award-winning, accomplished architect and maverick of sorts, who is an avid art enthusiast.

item.title: ACHIEVE CONFIDENCE, BEAUTY AND HEALTHIER SKIN WITH DR.KO® SKIN SPECIALIST
item.description: Keeping it healthy gives you a sense of positivity and confidence.

item.title: EXPERIENCE A GREAT DENTAL TREATMENT AT KLINIK PERGIGIAN BANGSAR
item.description: Klinik Pergigian Bangsar is known to be one of the best dental clinics in town.

item.title: ENHANCE YOUR EYES AND BEAUTY AT DRS EYE AESTHETIC SPECIALIST
item.description: The eyes are today's aesthetic focal point, hence why everyone would want to improve their eye appearance by greatly reducing puffy or baggy eyelids, fine lines, and wrinkles with cosmetic eye services.

item.title: LEGENDARY LALA NOODLES IN KUALA LUMPUR
item.description: Nothing is guaranteed to warm your heart more than a bowl of steaming hot noodles, preferably served with a lot of toppings.

item.title: 5 BEST MALLS IN KL FOR A YEAR-END-SALE SHOPPING SPREE!
item.description: Malaysia's Year End Sale is back, and there are countless special deals you can see in the malls across the country, particularly in Kuala Lumpur.

item.title: A PERSONALISED, HOLISTIC WELLNESS AND MEDICAL AESTHETIC CLINIC IN KL - ANNA HOO CLINIC
item.description: Anna Hoo Clinic is a group of wellness and medical aesthetic clinics that helps you to achieve optimal health through safe, personalized, and scientifically proven treatments to help you age healthily and gracefully.

item.title: 2 DAYS 1 NIGHT CAMP AT SUNWAY LAGOON!
item.description: Sunway Lagoon will provide you an extension of their Best Day Ever experience.

item.title: HAVE AN ENJOYABLE TIME WITH YOUR FRIENDS & FAMILY AT AEON FANTASY
item.description: Aeon Fantasy Malaysia mainly provides fun family-friendly entertainment centres that are safe for children.

item.title: COME AND CHECK OUT KL THE GUIDE NOW!
item.description: Well, don't get worked up by scouring the internet for information.

item.title: ENHANCE YOUR BEAUTY NOW AT PREMIER CLINIC
item.description: The Premier Clinic is here to help you to conquer your insecurities and refine your physical appearance based on your requests.

item.title: MINGLE AND CUDDLE WITH THESE SIBERIAN HUSKIES AT THE HUSKITORY
item.description: Away from the bustling historical city, immerse yourself into the Siberian husky world with the soft touch of the paws of furry huskies, suitable for all age groups of family and friends.

item.title: COOK YOUR OWN BBQ MEAT AND RAMEN WITH UNLIMITED INGREDIENTS @ HERB VALLEY BBQ
item.description: Herb Valley BBQ is a Korean BBQ Buffet located at Tropicana Gardens Mall.

item.title: 5 HIPSTER CAFES IN KUALA LUMPUR
item.description: These cafes in Kuala Lumpur serve high-quality drinks, such as some unique tea and coffee variations, but the majority of them are well-known for their lavish brunches and delicious desserts since most of them double as cafes and bakeries.

item.title: EXPLORE THE MIND BLOWING OF TANDOORI DISHES AND AROMATIC BIRYANI IN TOWN!
item.description: This restaurant serves the best Indian cuisines in town, especially their mind-blowing tandoori dishes and tasty aromatic biryani.

item.title: RELAX AND REJUVENATE AT THESE SPAS IN KUALA LUMPUR
item.description: Prepare to let go of all the unpleasant tensions, worries, and fatigue that have been holding you back for quite some time.

item.title: WANDER THROUGH KL'S CHINATOWN AND SHOP TIL' YOU DROP
item.description: The Chinatown is situated in Petaling Street which comprises ancient temples, markets, various foods and many more.

item.title: AESTHETIC HEALTH AND BEAUTY FROM DR. INDER
item.description: Klinik Dr. Inder, a pioneer in aesthetic and medical trends, provides aesthetic beauty services in the Petaling Jaya, Selangor, business district.

item.title: THE BEST AUTHENTIC FILIPINO FOOD IN KL - THE NARRA FILIPINO!
item.description: THE NARRA FILIPINO is a Filipino restaurant situated in Dataran Millennium in Petaling Jaya.

item.title: TWO-MINUTE WALK FROM PETRONAS TWIN TOWERS TO CORUS HOTEL
item.description: The Corus Hotel is situated along Jalan Ampang, along the prestigious "Embassy Row", at the intersection of Kuala Lumpur's "Golden Triangle," which encompasses the city's prime business, financial, and entertainment districts.

item.title: PARADIGM MALL
item.description: Paradigm Mall PJ comprises various types of shops ranging from eateries to department stores.

item.title: HAVE YOU BEEN TO THESE PLACES FILLED WITH ART?
item.description: As we all know, each artist has their own story to tell in their art, hence it is based on your own interpretation to understand what the artist has portrayed in their works.

item.title: Things You Must Know Before Boarding a Plane
item.description: Love reading our blog and want to read more?

item.title: STAYCATION AT ANSA HOTEL KL, BUKIT BINTANG THIS WEEKEND!
FARM, PARKS AND ZOO FILLED WITH ANIMALS, YOU CAN FIND IN KUALA LUMPUR!
5 CAFE IN KUALA LUMPUR WITH SPECIALLY DESIGNED PASTRIES AND AMAZING LATTE ARTS!
item.description: Are you having a long day and want to take a break, why not have a cup of coffee and some pastries from cafés which are located in Kuala Lumpur.

item.title: BEYOND KL - RUSTCAMPS GLAMING RESORT IN GENTING HIGHLANDS
BEYOND KL - SHOPPING AT 34 BATARAS OUTLET AT SABAH!
item.description: Bataras Sdn Bhd was founded on December 5, 1998, in FT Labuan. It was initially run as a small-scale supermarket, but later evolved into a hypermarket. Bataras is now Sabah’s leading mass market retailer of daily needs, with over 30 stores and two distribution centers spread over the “Land Below the Wind”.

item.title: BEYOND KL - THE ONE AND ONLY, BORNEAN SUN BEAR CONSERVATION CENTRE, SABAH!
SHANGRI-LA, KUALA LUMPUR, IT WILL BE A TRIP TO REMEMBER!
item.description: Credit to Shangri-La

item.title: WANT TO LIVE LIKE ROYALTIES? COME TO THESE 5 STAR HOTELS THAT YOU CAN ONLY FIND IN KUALA LUMPUR!
ROTI CANAI TEROWONG,NASI GORENG CENGKUR, LONTONG BERLAUK ALL AT AYANGS KITCHEN, BANTING
item.description: n it is 2.2 kilometers away from Gold Coast Morib Resort which is a 3-minute drive, not to mention it is around the housing area of a few homestays which are all walking distance from each other.

item.title: RINGS, NECKLACE, PENDANTS, EARRINGS AND BRACELETS MADE FROM GOLD ALL AT POINTERS JEWELLERS, SUBANG JAYA!
item.description: Pointers Jewellers (M) Sdn Bhd, (Pointers) is a jeweler and specialty retailer; whose merchandise offerings include customized jewelry, corporate and employee gifts, special events and extensive selection of jewelry for all their customers. They engage themselves in customized product design, manufacturing and retailing activities.

item.title: ONE WORLD HOTEL, BANDAR UTAMA. RELAXING HERE MAKES EVERY MOMENT A LUXURY!
item.description: Surrounded by lush greenery,

item.title: FANCY AND TRADITIONAL ALL IN ONE PERFECT MIX, ONLY IN THE BATIK BOUTIQUE
item.description: Batik is one of Malaysia's traditional outfit design it is done by

item.title: MORAC GO KART TRACK 1 UTAMA FEEL THE ADRENALINE PUMPING WITH THE GO KART!
PARADIGM MALL SHOP TILL YOUR HEAR IS CONTENT, AND EXPERIENCE ESCAPE AS WELL!
item.description: For any impulse buy, from a necessary convenience to a trendy treasure, you will find it at

item.title: SUNWAY LAGOON! WHERE AMUSEMENT PARK, SCREAM PARK, WATER PARK, WILDLIFE PARK, NICKELODEON LOST LAGOON AND X PARK ALL IN THE SAME PLACE!
item.description: One of the rides that most people will go for is the Lost City Scream Coaster. Its is a roller coaster which design is based on a mine train, it is definitely a ride to take on early because the adrenaline rush that it gives you is what you will need to keep the day running.

item.title: INTERCONTINENTAL KUALA LUMPUR HOTEL - MAKES YOU FEEL LIKE AN A KING!
NAJI NYONYA WITH AN AWARD WINNING CURRY CHICKEN & VEGETABLE RICE FROM DINDING'S POULTRY PRIMARY THAT YOU HAVE GOT TO TRY!
item.description: NAJI Nyonya Cafe is a Nyonya Café located in Petaling Jaya, it comes with a fusion restaurant with

item.title: BOLEH SEAFOOD POT WITH ATAS COMBO SET MAKING YOU FEEL LIKE YOU'RE EATING LIKE A KING!
item.description: Boleh Seafood Pot is a seafood restaurant that is filled to brim with mountain of seafood of your choice. They are located by the outskirts of Bukit Bintang which is a 6 minutes walk from Sungai Wang, 10 minutes walk from Pavilion and 3 minutes away from the wall art area around Bukit Bintang.

item.title: SHUTTER IN THE DARK KLCC, SCI-FI BADMINTON AS IF YOU ARE IN SPACE!
item.description: Shuttle In The Dark is located within Kuala Lumpur City Center (KLCC), it is a badminton court based on glow in the dark theme. It is the first of its kind in Malaysia making it an experience worth while. The experience is a part of Twin Tower Fitness Centre and collaboration with Malaysia Badminton Experience.

item.title: IPC SHOPPPING SHOPPING, MUTIARA DAMANSARA WILL NEVER BE THE SAME AFTER COMING HERE!
item.description: ipc Shopping Centre is located within Mutiara Damansara. It is within walking distance from e@Curve, IKEA, TESCO, The Curve and The Royale Bintang Damansara Hotel.

item.title: KL CRAFT COMPLEX, CHINATOWN, KL'S CENTRAL MARKET! 3 PLACES TO VISIT BEFORE LEAVING KL
item.description: You know the saying ‘Save the best for last’? They’re not exactly wrong, especially when you’re on a travelling spree. You’re done with sightseeing places by now, and maybe some picture for your photo album.

item.title: 5 THINGS TO DO ON A RAINY DAY DURING TRAVELLING
item.description: Sometimes the weather might not be suitable for an outdoor adventures and activities. Let’s just take a break from outside world and enjoy the little things in life. No need to be overwhelmed, just enjoy the cool weather while multi tasking with other fun things will do.

item.title: ICON BREWING, WITH PASTRIES THAT MAKES YOUR MOUTH WATER!
item.description: Icon Brewings is a cafe located in Cheras, it is a breakfast specialized café with four years of neighborhood trust and support, more than 25 breakfast options, and no time constraints for eating a nutritious meal.

item.title: HARD ROCK CAFE IS ALL OVER THE WORLD AND ONE IS NEAR YOU TOO!
item.description: , maybe not exactly what it is but you must have known of it from a friend, maybe someone brought it up, or you saw it somewhere.

item.title: ESCAPE ROOM THAT WILL MAKE YOU SCREAM IN KUALA LUMPUR!
item.description: Escape room is one of the more recent entertainments for the younger generations. It is mainly a puzzle game that involves with trying to escape the room by solving riddles and puzzles being challenged to the audience. Each room is based on a certain theme, story or even topic, and the audience will need to escape the room under a certain time limit to win.

item.title: WHAT TO DO INSIDE PETRONAS TWIN TOWERS?
item.description: A symbol of the country’s pride and progress, the magnificent dual structure stands at 452 metres with 88 storeys. This iconic architectural wonder is also the reigning tallest twin tower in the world and symbolic of the heritage and culture of the Malaysian people. For example, the interior motifs are designed to resemble Malaysia’s local handicraft and weaving patterns, with a stunning combination of stainless steel and glass finishing on the building to form beautiful Islamic patterns.

item.title: ARE YOU A BUBBLE TEA LOVER? HAVE U TRIED THESE BOBA DRINKS?
3 ARABIAN FOOD IN KUALA LUMPUR! FROM SHAWARMA TO KEBAB KEEPING YOUR BELLY FILLED!
item.description: Arabian food

item.title: LOCATIONS TO BRING YOUR KIDS, ANIMAL PETTING AND FEEDING! 2 BEST LOCATION FOR ANIMAL LOVERS!
item.description: For the animal lover out there, rejoice! We have a place for you to be excited for. Grab your socks ready because we are are going to an adventure.

item.title: 3 INSTAGRAMMABLE LOCATIONS IN KUALA LUMPUR! STUNNING PICTURE WITH WONDEROUS BACKGROUNDS!
item.description: Malaysia certainly is an amazing place to not only take pictures in but it is also the home to many of us, with its flashy light and colourful atmosphere no wonder Kuala Lumpur is one hotspot for Instagrammers.

item.title: A CHARMING STAYCATION WITH FAMILY & FRIENDS - INTERCONTINENTAL KUALA LUMPUR
NOURISHING MUNCHYBABY PLATTERS & GIFTS
BEYOND KL - AUTHENTIC HOMESTYLE NASI ARAB AT RESTAURANT AL HANIN
BEYOND KL - CRUNCHY KEREPEK BAWANG AT EDARAN SHARIFAH ENTERPRISE
item.description: Great news for chips lovers out there! Ederan Sharifah Enterprice sells the yummiest crunchy onion chips known as 'kerepek bawang' in the town of Johor. Believe it or not, they have made justice to their kerepek business with their authentic homemade chips which comes in different flavours and shapes.

item.title: BEYOND KL - RAW FRESH SEAFOOD AT WARONG TOK NUAR BAUNG BERAPI
